title: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Older Adults 16 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults AIDS/HIV AGE+ CIRCLES OF CARE THE DALLES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Matches volunteers with older adults to provide assistance such as friendly visits or phone calls, transportation to medical appointments, grocery shopping, light housework, and yard work. Volunteer opportunities are also available. Eligibility: Supportive services: Age 55 and older Volunteers: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (503) 408-0724 Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES TRANSPORTATION REACHING PEOPLE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transportation for medical appointments, personal business, and shopping. Priority is given to life-sustaining medical appointments. Rides are provided within Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties. The Ride Together program allows riders to recruit their own volunteer driver (i.e., family, neighbors, and friends). Participants schedule rides with their volunteer driver. Mileage reimbursement is provided, and volunteer training is required. The Vets Driving Vets program matches veterans who volunteer their services with other veterans who need rides to doctors' appointments or to take care of other basic needs. 2051 Kaen Road #135 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Age 65 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Transportation services: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 655-8208 3 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLEARVIEW DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER TRANSPORTATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers private and non-emergency medical transportation services. 1114 SW Frazer Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Low-income households, adults with disabilities, or age 55 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 276-1130 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOOD RIVER VALLEY ADULT CENTER CIRCLES OF CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of services to assist with daily needs including help with everyday chores, grocery shopping, light housework, yard work, local transportation, and friendly check-ins. Services are provided by volunteers and program accepts new volunteers's. 2010 Sterling Place Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Supportive services: Age 55 and older Volunteers: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 386-2060 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION IRCO SENIOR SERVICES CENTER SENIOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home delivered meals, naturalization assistance, homebound assistance, limited transportation assistance, case management, health and wellness activities, and focal point leadership for older adults and their caregivers. An Information and Assistance specialist is available to provide information and referrals. 10165 SE Cherry Blossom Drive Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Age 60 and older. Some services have income eligibility criteria. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Meals: Varies (503) 484-8800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION CENTRAL OFFICE SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to older adults, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers. Services include Medicaid case management, SNAP/food stamps administration, and transportation. 209 SW 4th Avenue Suite 510 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 988-3646 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION EAST AREA OFFICE SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to older adults, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers. Services include Medicaid case management, SNAP/food stamps administration, and transportation. 600 NE 8th Street Suite 100 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 988-3840 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION MID-COUNTY OFFICE SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to older adults, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers. Services include Medicaid case management, SNAP/food stamps administration, and transportation. 11982 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 988-5480 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION NORTH/NORTHEAST OFFICE SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to older adults, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers. Services include Medicaid case management, SNAP/food stamps administration, and transportation. 5325 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 988-5470 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION SOUTHEAST OFFICE SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to older adults, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers. Services include Medicaid case management, SNAP/food stamps administration, and transportation. 4610 SE Belmont Street 2nd Floor Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 988-3660 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION WEST AREA OFFICE SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to older adults, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers. Services include Medicaid case management, SNAP/food stamps administration, and transportation. 209 SW 4th Avenue 1st floor Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 988-5460 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST CHRISTIAN CHURCH NORTHWEST CHRISTIAN CHURCH NEWBERG CAMPUS MEDICAL RIDES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transportation to medical appointments. ADA vehicles are available. 2315 Villa Road Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Age 55 and older Hours: Varies Email (503) 538-3104 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SOUTH COAST BUSINESS MAIN OFFICE ASSISTED TRANSPORTATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers door-to-door transportation for out-of-town medical appointments. Services are provided by volunteers. 800 N Bayshore Drive Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Transportation times vary and are based on volunteer availability. Email (541) 269-2013 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SOUTH COAST BUSINESS SENIOR SERVICES ASSISTED TRANSPORTATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers door-to-door transportation for out-of-town medical appointments. Services are provided by volunteers. 1216 Moore Street Suite #214 Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Transportation times vary and are based on volunteer availability. (541) 412-8820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VOLUNTEER CAREGIVERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Volunteers provide transportation to medical appointments and friendly visiting. Handyman chores, installing grab bars and other minor home repairs, some yard work, grocery and shopping assistance, and information and referrals are amongst services provided. Medical transportation can be provided to Albany, Corvallis, Eugene, Lebanon, Portland, Salem and Portland only to OHSU and Veterans Hospital. 930 SW Queen Avenue Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Age 55 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-12:30pm Voicemail available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 928-2173 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VOLUNTEER INTERFAITH CAREGIVERS OF CORVALLIS INC VOLUNTEER INTERFAITH CAREGIVERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with shopping and non-emergency medical transportation. Also can assist in the design and building of wheelchair ramps, chair platforms, stairs, and handrails. Appointments must be made at least 3 days prior to service. 501 NW 25th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 714-0820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES TRANSPORTATION REACHING PEOPLE CLEARVIEW DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER TRANSPORTATION HOOD RIVER VALLEY ADULT CENTER CIRCLES OF CARE IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION SENIOR SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES NORTHWEST CHRISTIAN CHURCH MEDICAL RIDES SOUTH COAST BUSINESS ASSISTED TRANSPORTATION SOUTH COAST BUSINESS ASSISTED TRANSPORTATION VOLUNTEER CAREGIVERS VOLUNTEER CAREGIVERS VOLUNTEER INTERFAITH CAREGIVERS OF CORVALLIS INC VOLUNTEER INTERFAITH CAREGIVERS
